problem: Health systems struggle to deploy and run AI at scale, need to prioritize critical cases for timely clinical decision-making, track patient progress for follow-up care, and coordinate workflows across service lines
solution: aiOS enterprise AI platform that seamlessly integrates with PACS, EHR, RIS and scheduling - automatically applying multiple algorithms to flag abnormalities, enabling prioritization, care coordination, and follow-up tracking with CE-marked algorithms for neuro, chest, vascular, breast, and bone imaging
